description: Style NoteMulti purpose bags with oodles of style and tons of detailing mark baggit out - and they also succeed in keeping the designs understated and charming. Easily to pair up with whatever you're wearing to complement any outfit. Go ahead and grab your favourite from Baggit's classy range of bags. Product DetailsBlack bag with branding at the backFlap in front with a buckle detail and a magnetic closureOne zippered main compartment with a zippered internal compartment and an elasticated pocket insideOne zippered compartment at the backMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 26 cm Width:  27 cm
